title: Toli-X
content:

{{Quote|My parents died during the great Toli-X outbreak.|V-Davi|<ref name="TFFT" />}}
'''Toli-X''' was a mutated virus that spread from [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to planet through [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] mold, contaminating many worlds<ref name="TFFT" /> around [[54 BBY/Legends|54 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]'' to [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. ''The Fight for Truth'' states that the Toli-X virus spread ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the events of the novel, placing the start of the outbreak in [[54 BBY/Legends|54 BBY]].</ref> Although lethal to [[Human/Legends|Humans]] if untreated, the Toli-X infection could be cured by a [[Toli-X vaccine|vaccine]] created shortly after the virus appeared. During a [[Mission to Kegan|mission]] to [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]]<ref name="TFFT" /> in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] discovered that the the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet had had a severe outbreak of Toli-X [[51 BBY/Legends|seven]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior, but had never learned of the vaccine because of their [[General Good|isolationist government]]. The [[Parent/Legends|parents]] of [[V-Davi]], a [[Keganite|local]] [[Gender/Legends|boy]] Tachi and Kenobi became acquainted with, had [[Death/Legends|died]] of the virus when V-Davi was two years old. To save him from unnecessary grief, the Jedi apprentices initially decided not to reveal that a cure against Toli-X had been developed, until they had to use the fact as impetus to help break V-Davi of the brainwashing of the [[Re-Learning Circle]].<ref name="TFFT" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Toli-X virus was first mentioned in [[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth|''The Fight for Truth'']], a [[2000]] novel that was the ninth installment in the [[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice|''Jedi Apprentice'']] series of young reader books by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="TFFT" />
